claim.statement: An external hash-pinned RUP plugin can certify the bundled W(3,3) certificate.
claim.negation_of: a 3-coloring of {1,...,27} with no monochromatic 3-term arithmetic progression

provenance.pipeline: verified artifact staged into a temp dir, then checked by a hash-pinned external plugin

one_directional: The plugin only proposes a verdict; runner-owned gates decide the final verdict record.
